mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, email, gender, major, grade, created_at, updated_at FROM students
AND ( id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (id, name, email, gender, major, grade) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{major}, #{grade})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, major = #{major}, grade = #{grade}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
